channel.title: CUDA on Jodavid Ferreira
channel.description: Recent content in CUDA on Jodavid Ferreira

item.title: Comparison of time efficiency of a same function in R
item.description: Hi guys, in this Post it is verified the efficiency in question of time of execution of functions created for Matrix multiplication. An array with dimensions \(1000\times1000\) was generated using the rnorm function in R. The first function called mult.matrix uses the base function of R for matrix multiplication, for example, consider A as a square matrix, multiplication is obtained by A%*%A.
